scripts.deploy: bash -lc 'set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; DEST="${HA_HACS_DIR:-$HA_HACS_PATH}"; [ -n "$DEST" ] || { echo "Set HA_HACS_DIR (or HA_HACS_PATH) in .env"; exit 1; }; BUILD=$(node -e "const fs=require(\"node:fs\"); const s=fs.readFileSync(\"hacs-dyson-remote.js\",\"utf8\"); const m=s.match(/_dysonRemoteBuildToken\s*=\s*\"([^\"]+)\"/); console.log(m?m[1]:\"unknown\");"); TAG=$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S); echo "Deploying DYSON_REMOTE_BUILD: $BUILD"; rsync -av "hacs-dyson-remote.js" "$DEST/hacs-dyson-remote.js" && mkdir -p "$DEST/dist" && rsync -av "dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js" "$DEST/dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js" && if command -v gzip >/dev/null 2>&1; then gzip -9 -c "$DEST/hacs-dyson-remote.js" > "$DEST/hacs-dyson-remote.js.gz"; gzip -9 -c "$DEST/dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js" > "$DEST/dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js.gz"; echo "Refreshed gzip assets"; else rm -f "$DEST/hacs-dyson-remote.js.gz" "$DEST/dist/hacs-dyson-remote.js.gz"; echo "gzip not found; removed stale .gz assets"; fi && echo "Deployed DYSON_REMOTE_BUILD: $BUILD" && echo "Paste this in HA resource URL to force refresh:" && echo "/hacsfiles/hacs-dyson-remote/hacs-dyson-remote.js?hacstag=$TAG"'
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy
